screen, the movie theaters.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":398.98,"start":394.94}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"They go right to Netflix, Amazon, Apple, Disney Plus, Hulu, Peacock, Paramount, you name it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":406.228,"start":398.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":407.02,"start":406.228}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And there--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":408.07,"start":407.03}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"There's approximately 27 of them at this point.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":410.14,"start":408.08}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Is that how many?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":411.1,"start":410.15}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I don't know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":411.64,"start":411.11}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That's a lot.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":412.45,"start":411.65}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":413.242,"start":412.46}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":414.31,"start":413.242}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So there, the digital streamer--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":417.67,"start":414.32}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Netflix or Disney-- typically is paying a flat fee for the film, right?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":424.3,"start":417.67}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And then, it stays on that platform sometimes forever, meaning it doesn't have any other life.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":429.34,"start":424.3}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So the revenue that is associated with it, one, is very different in terms of where it comes from.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":436,"start":429.34}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But two, it's not like there's direct revenue attributed to that film.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":440.087,"start":436}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":440.92,"start":440.087}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So the whole industry right now is struggling to contend with how people are paid in this new world order.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":449.17,"start":440.93}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And what was happening with Scarlett was that there was a--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":453.31,"start":449.17}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"first of all, Covid was really disrupting what already was a business that was being disrupted.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":458.66,"start":453.31}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And so first, the decision was made to delay, delay, delay, then ultimately, the decision was made to skip the movie theaters, then go directly to service.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":467.32,"start":458.66}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And obviously, that created tension.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":468.82,"start":467.32}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"It was more than tension.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":470.445,"start":468.82}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Disney said she had callous disregard for the effects of Covid-19.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":473.36,"start":470.445}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"She said, your annual bonus was tied to performance at Disney Plus.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":476.95,"start":473.36}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I know you and I talked a lot about the streaming business model causing problems long ago when you started doing it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":483.13,"start":476.95}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Did you have a choice?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":484.415,"start":483.13}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, a choice in what sense?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":486.04,"start":484.415}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"In terms of not going to streaming.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":487.9,"start":486.05}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"You had Netflix, sort of, lapping all of you companies around the track.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":491.05,"start":487.9}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Look, if you're in the business of creating what we call filmed entertainment or television and movies, you're not doing that for just pro bono--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":499.39,"start":491.06}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right, no.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":500.39,"start":499.39}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--or charity.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":501.43,"start":500.4}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You'd be in the business of making money doing it, and you're going to follow the money, which in this case is following the consumer.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":507.86,"start":501.43}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And so you don't really have a choice if you want to stay in the business or grow the business, except to go in the streaming direction.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":516.82,"start":507.86}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I made the decision for Disney to do that in 2015.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":520.72,"start":516.82}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"We ultimately launched Disney Plus in 2019.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":524.89,"start":520.73}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So I don't think there was a choice.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":527.23,"start":524.89}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Was there a choice in selecting films?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":529.72,"start":527.23}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yes, but Covid took a lot of that choice away.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":532.27,"start":529.72}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"It just accelerated trends that were already in place.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":534.195,"start":532.28}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yes.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":534.778,"start":534.205}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think what Covid did actually-- it accelerated a change in consumer behavior, which is that pre-Covid, there was growth in these streaming services.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":543.37,"start":534.778}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"What Covid did is, it forced people in, and people still wanted to be entertained, so they figured out how to use-- basically, I call it app-based television or app-based entertainment.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":551.952,"start":543.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And they now like it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":553.41,"start":551.952}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And they got really comfortable with it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":555.84,"start":553.42}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"They not only like it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":557.25,"start":555.84}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"They discovered that there's huge choice.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":559.65,"start":557.25}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"There's tremendous amount of quality for everybody.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":563.43,"start":559.65}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"The good side of this for talent is that because of technology, which enables more distribution and more consumption, what the industry has discovered with the growth and consumption is a growth in production.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":577.55,"start":563.43}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So there's a lot more being made.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":579.34,"start":577.55}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"There are hundreds and hundreds of T.V. series being made now.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":582.76,"start":579.34}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So if you're a writer, a director--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":584.555,"start":582.76}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So there's more work is what you're saying.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":586.93,"start":584.555}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Much more.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":587.763,"start":586.94}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"The streaming model--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":589.57,"start":587.763}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"when you think about where streaming is going, is that the death of movie theaters?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":593.6,"start":589.57}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I think theaters are going to become a smaller and smaller business.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":596.56,"start":593.6}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Doesn't mean they don't exist, but that it becomes less and less.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":599.62,"start":596.56}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"It becomes sort of tent poles, like the Spider-Man movie.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":602.86,"start":599.62}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And every time one comes out, like \"Spider-Man,\" I get an email or text from Ari Emanuel, and he's like, see?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":608.68,"start":602.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And I'm like, it's one movie.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":610.03,"start":608.68}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What do you imagine is going to happen to the analog movie-going experience?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":613.655,"start":610.03}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't think it's the death.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":615.28,"start":613.655}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think it's a severe injury--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":617.872,"start":615.28}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":618.58,"start":617.872}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--that maybe doesn't heal.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":620.47,"start":618.59}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":621.235,"start":620.48}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And what I mean by that is--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":622.96,"start":621.245}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Wow.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":623.83,"start":622.97}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Not fatal.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":624.67,"start":623.84}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":625.69,"start":624.68}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It might be fatal to some.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":628.2,"start":625.7}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Let's start with the movie-going experience, to say something good about that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":631.45,"start":628.2}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":632.29,"start":631.46}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think that people will still want to go to movies.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":636.392,"start":632.3}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":637.1,"start":636.392}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"However, they will be much more, I think, discerning about what movies they want to see out of the home, where you're likely, I think, to say or ask yourself, wait a minute, is this a movie I need to see on the big screen and do all that, or can I wait or not even wait, for that matter,","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":655.6,"start":637.11}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"and see it at home?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":656.47,"start":655.6}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":657.303,"start":656.48}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You know, \"Spider-Man,\" which Marvel and Walt Disney Company produced for Sony, when that came out there was a slew of people around the world wanting to see it first weekend.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":667.3,"start":657.303}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And there are films like that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":669.02,"start":667.3}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But there are a lot of films that don't fit into that category, or that don't really need to be watched in a larger-than-life experience.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":675.16,"start":669.02}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":675.993,"start":675.17}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And so I think what you're going to see is far fewer films released for the big screen.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":680.83,"start":675.993}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So talk a little bit, because we used to call those plane movies, right?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":683.17,"start":680.84}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I'll see it on the plane, but now of course, we're not on planes.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":685.878,"start":683.17}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And then, the moviegoing experience is horrible.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":688.69,"start":685.878}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And it's not just it's expensive.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":690.25,"start":688.69}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"It's improved in some places, certainly, but it's not one that has improved in terms of experiential.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":696.61,"start":690.26}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Even seats-- some of them have gotten better, but not a lot of them.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":699.89,"start":696.61}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And then, when you layer Covid in, it's like, oh, boy, expensive popcorn and Covid.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":703.78,"start":699.89}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Great.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":704.8,"start":703.78}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So what has to change in the movie-going experience?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":708.13,"start":704.8}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm going to be a little bit more kind to movie theater owners.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":711.53,"start":708.14}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"There are some that have figured it out and have improved the experience-- better chairs that recline, just generally better service, the ability to buy tickets online.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":720.82,"start":711.53}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But there's no question that it has to be perfect.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":723.19,"start":720.82}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It's very unforgiving for people to really want to do it, because they have alternatives.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":727.42,"start":723.19}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And by the way, it's not even about whether you watch a movie on the big screen or at home.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":732.13,"start":727.43}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It's just, you have so many more choices in the home.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":735.31,"start":732.13}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Think about the number of TV series that we're talking about--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":738.31,"start":735.31}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"at a quality level that's pretty good, much better, from a production-value perspective, than it used to be.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":744.49,"start":738.31}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"There are movies-- when we make \"Mandalorian\" or--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":747.97,"start":744.5}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I say, \"we.\"","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":748.54,"start":747.97}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm not allowed to say \"we\" anymore.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":750.32,"start":748.54}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I lost the ability to say \"we\" three weeks ago.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":752.65,"start":750.32}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"When I used to-- when they-- whenever--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":756.4,"start":753.65}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":758.05,"start":756.41}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"You can say, \"my ex\" if you want.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":759.58,"start":758.05}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You know, I was joking--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":759.8,"start":759.59}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Could do that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":759.83,"start":759.8}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"If you were to look at some of the films, some of the T.V. shows that Disney has made--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":760.02,"start":759.83}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"\"Mandalorian\" being one, the Marvel series, \"Falcon and the Winter Solider,\" \"Loki\"-- each one of those is a movie.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":764.812,"start":760.02}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":774.37,"start":773.578}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"They were.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":774.87,"start":774.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So just, movie theaters have much more competition than they ever had before.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":779.39,"start":774.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So I just interviewed Joseph Gordon-Levitt on \"Sway,\" and he told me that Silicon Valley now owns Hollywood.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":785.02,"start":779.4}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Now, you have had a lot of experience with tech, but talk a little bit about that idea of tech owning Hollywood.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":791.5,"start":785.02}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Now, Amazon's in, Apple's in, Google's kind of in?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":795.97,"start":791.5}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't think anybody owns Hollywood, and no one ever will.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":799.88,"start":795.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But there's no question that deep-pocketed technology companies--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":804.94,"start":799.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Apple being a great example of that, Amazon being another--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":808.69,"start":804.94}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"have figured out that if they make intellectual property or tell stories, that it will benefit their other businesses-- in Amazon's case, to sell more Prime customers, in Apple's case, I imagine, to sell more devices.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":822.91,"start":808.69}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And so they figured out that they can make TV and movies.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":826.62,"start":822.92}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Took them a little time, but not too long, to figure out how to make really good ones.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":831.1,"start":826.62}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"\"Ted Lasso\" is a great example of a really fine show that they've made.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":834.104,"start":831.1}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Nothing to do with me.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":834.424,"start":834.104}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":834.924,"start":834.424}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"No.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":837.22,"start":836.512}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm like all of you on that one.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":838.46,"start":837.23}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I can't wait for the next episode to come out or the next season to start.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":841.87,"start":838.46}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But the trouble is, competing with them is hard, because--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":846.295,"start":841.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't want to suggest those are lost-leader businesses, but--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":848.92,"start":846.295}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"They are lost-leader busi--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":849.67,"start":848.93}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But they're in those businesses for other reasons.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":852.19,"start":849.68}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Nonetheless, they have so much money.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":854.35,"start":852.2}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Like, the money they have is-- this is a rounding error.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":857.06,"start":854.35}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yeah, look.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":857.98,"start":857.07}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I can only speak for Disney.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":860.17,"start":857.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"We view them, all of them, as competitors, but we never worried that they were going to put us out of business or own Hollywood, particularly since--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":870.64,"start":860.17}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"and maybe this was a conscious decision that we made--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":874.09,"start":870.64}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"actually, I made, when I became C.E.O.--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":876.49,"start":874.09}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"is that if we own a lot of high-quality branded content, then--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":881.93,"start":876.49}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Like Marvel or--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":883.18,"start":881.93}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Marvel, Pixar, \"Star Wars,\" \"The Simpsons,\" \"Avatar,\" you name it--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":888.16,"start":883.19}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"National Geographic-- that that would enable us to withstand not only disruption of a business, but the incursion of new entrants into the business, even very, very deep-pocketed, very competitive competitors.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":903.953,"start":888.16}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Because you had all this--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":905.62,"start":903.953}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Because they can't make a \"Star Wars\" movie.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":907.87,"start":905.63}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"They can't make a \"Thor\" movie.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":909.31,"start":907.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"They can maybe figure out how to make animation, but doing it at the Pixar level or the Disney level after decades of doing that, you don't just snap your fingers and make a great film.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":919.42,"start":909.31}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But you think about all the intellectual property.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":921.64,"start":919.42}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Marvel has 7,000 characters.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":923.8,"start":921.64}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And when that red Marvel comes on, which was purposeful in our part when we bought them, which has put a spotlight on the brand, it means something to the audience.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":932.35,"start":923.81}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And the stories are now interwoven, and so there's a seamlessness between the television series and the movies.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":938.95,"start":932.35}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Basically, the storytelling over multiple genres and multiple media has real value, and they don't have that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":947.44,"start":938.95}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yet.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":949.297,"start":947.45}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, maybe that's one of the reasons why I retired.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":951.88,"start":949.297}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":952.422,"start":951.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah, really.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":953.547,"start":952.422}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":954.1,"start":953.547}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Because one of the things I was thinking--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":955.85,"start":954.11}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I remember talking to David Zaslav, who's now going to be leading the combined Warner Discovery.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":961,"start":955.85}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"One of the things I kept thinking is, you're too small.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":964.21,"start":961}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Are these media companies too small, when you're looking at what's arrayed against you?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":968.62,"start":964.21}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":969.58,"start":968.63}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Those-- these media companies--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":971.09,"start":969.58}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm going to leave Disney out.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":972.34,"start":971.09}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":973.048,"start":972.34}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Because Disney is not too small.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":974.87,"start":973.048}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But when Rupert Murdoch called me in 2017 to talk about possibly buying some of the assets of his company, he asked me whether I thought they were too small, and could they basically survive all of this new competition.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":997.3,"start":974.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And he was thinking--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":998.74,"start":997.3}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think, smartly-- of exiting a good part of the business, because he worried that they didn't have the scale.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1005.4,"start":998.74}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I was thinking at the time, knowing that we were going to be launching Disney Plus and going into the streaming business, that if we had, on top of Marvel, Pixar, \"Star Wars,\" Disney, ESPN, ABC--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1017.79,"start":1005.41}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"if we had National Geographic, and \"The Simpsons,\" and \"Avatar,\" and the whole Fox library, and the great people talent that came with those assets, that we would have the scale, particularly to go into the streaming business.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1032.337,"start":1017.79}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Who does it?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1033.42,"start":1032.337}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"The other companies-- I just read a story about Comcast not having enough, or--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1037.8,"start":1033.42}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I do think Warner Discovery is too small.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1040.47,"start":1037.8}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm in an enviable position right now, just because I'm not working for Disney.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1044.233,"start":1040.48}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm kind of liberated.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1045.15,"start":1044.233}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I can say anything about anybody.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1046.364,"start":1045.15}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1046.65,"start":1046.374}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Go ahead.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1047.15,"start":1046.65}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But I'm going to choose not to single anybody out.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1049.86,"start":1047.15}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Oh, come on.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1051.45,"start":1049.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think scale is an issue for a lot of the traditional companies that were in the television and movie business.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1058.812,"start":1051.46}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1059.52,"start":1058.812}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Well, that's all of them then.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1061.35,"start":1059.52}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1062.37,"start":1061.35}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So do you need--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1063.12,"start":1062.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That's your interpretation of what I said.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1064.66,"start":1063.13}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"But it's correct.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1065.952,"start":1064.67}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"But do you need to own a platform when you think about owning platforms?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1069.69,"start":1066.452}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Is that critically important?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1071.25,"start":1069.69}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yes.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1071.88,"start":1071.26}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"--around the whole idea?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1072.93,"start":1071.89}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And I mean that in a broader sense.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1074.34,"start":1072.93}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Disney was licensing movies to Netflix.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1076.26,"start":1074.35}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yes.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1076.47,"start":1076.27}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And they were building-- helping to build their platform--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1079.365,"start":1076.48}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yes, you did.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1080.49,"start":1079.365}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--on the back of our movies, and having the direct relationship with the consumer and building this global subscription business, which they did a brilliant job of, really.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1091.5,"start":1080.5}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"They deserve a lot of credit.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1092.97,"start":1091.5}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"While they were doing that, they were using some of the circulation that we helped them create and the subscription growth to fund their own television and movie production, directly competitive with us for talent and stories.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1105.84,"start":1092.97}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I woke up one day and thought, we're basically selling nuclear weapons technology to a Third World country, and now they're using it against us.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1113.478,"start":1105.84}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1114.27,"start":1113.478}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That's literally what I said.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1116.04,"start":1114.28}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Mm-hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1116.915,"start":1116.05}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So we decided at the time that we would stop licensing to Netflix and do it ourselves.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1123,"start":1116.915}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And it resulted in a substantial decrease in our revenue, because we weaned ourselves off all that licensing--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1128.227,"start":1123}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right, because it's like, oh, look, money.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1130.56,"start":1128.227}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But it thrust us into a business that is the most compelling growth engine in the media today.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1135.93,"start":1130.57}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right, for Disney and for the rest of them.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1138.46,"start":1135.94}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So when you think about this many streaming platforms--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1141.37,"start":1138.46}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I know I pay for all of them right now.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1143.177,"start":1141.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Why?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1143.76,"start":1143.177}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I don't know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1144.885,"start":1143.77}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"My children do it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1145.71,"start":1144.885}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I-- they just keep clicking.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1147.24,"start":1145.71}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And that's the end of my-- that's why I'm here, talking to you.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1149.91,"start":1147.24}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Anyway--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1150.41,"start":1149.91}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So can there be this many?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1153.9,"start":1151.57}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Can there be this many platforms?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1155.37,"start":1153.9}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think it's still too early to tell.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1156.75,"start":1155.38}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Does it become bundled?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1158.292,"start":1156.76}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, Disney's bundling Hulu and ESPN Plus.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1160.89,"start":1158.292}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"But you own a big chunk of it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1161.93,"start":1160.9}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1162.12,"start":1161.94}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1162.69,"start":1162.12}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think it's too early to tell.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1164.22,"start":1162.69}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Everybody is trying.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1165.57,"start":1164.22}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't think they'll all succeed.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1167.662,"start":1165.57}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So the answer is probably no.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1168.87,"start":1167.662}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Probably no.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1169.953,"start":1168.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Is there anyone you'd like to call out from--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1172.11,"start":1169.953}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"at the bottom of the pile?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1175.552,"start":1172.11}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Change the subject.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1176.76,"start":1175.552}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1176.959,"start":1176.77}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Paramount Plus.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1176.977,"start":1176.959}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1176.986,"start":1176.977}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Although they had \"Yellowstone,\" and they gave it over to Peacock.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1177.085,"start":1176.986}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What's going on with that?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1178.168,"start":1177.085}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1186.84,"start":1185.882}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"By the way, watch \"Yellowstone.\"","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1188.757,"start":1186.85}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"One of the things I'm thinking of is, recently, Microsoft announced buying Activision for $70 billion.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1193.812,"start":1188.757}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Activision has obviously had some cultural issues, but lots of these gaming companies do.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1197.52,"start":1193.812}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"But can you talk a little bit about why that wasn't bought by an entertainment company?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1201.48,"start":1197.52}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"That was sort of striking, that it was a tech company that bought it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1203.88,"start":1201.48}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, first of all--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1204.75,"start":1203.89}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Now, Microsoft's in gaming, obviously.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1206.01,"start":1204.76}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It's a big acquisition, in terms of money crossed.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1208.455,"start":1206.02}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yes.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1208.74,"start":1208.465}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And going back to what you were suggesting about the entertainment companies not having the scale--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1213.282,"start":1208.75}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah, they don't have the money.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1215.198,"start":1213.282}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--they're not necessarily on solid ground, from a financial perspective, and I don't think that they could have easily done it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1221.1,"start":1215.198}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Now, Comcast's big enough to do that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1223.81,"start":1221.1}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But I don't think, in most cases, there were synergies to be gained from an entertainment company buying those.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1230.37,"start":1223.81}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"In Microsoft's case-- and I'm an outsider looking at this--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1233.88,"start":1230.38}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"clearly, they're already in the gaming space--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1236.34,"start":1233.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Mm-hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1237.25,"start":1236.35}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--both on the platform side, and with games.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1239.83,"start":1237.26}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So I think that it's a natural fit.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1242.35,"start":1239.83}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And then, gaming and playing games could be a very, very large component for the consumer of an internet 3.0, metaverse experience.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1252.34,"start":1242.35}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So do entertainment companies need to be here then?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1256.37,"start":1252.35}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It's really hard.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1257.61,"start":1256.38}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You can spill a lot of money very quickly--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1259.628,"start":1257.61}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1260.42,"start":1259.628}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--getting into that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1261.67,"start":1260.43}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Need to be?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1263.6,"start":1261.67}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"No.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1264.68,"start":1263.6}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Entertainment companies-- to survive in an internet 3.0 world, you need to have some really compelling intellectual property.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1273.098,"start":1264.68}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"To turn into metaverse.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1274.64,"start":1273.098}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"We're going to get that in a second, but I want to talk about two things-- data, and then Steve Jobs, a little bit in terms of what you learned from him.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1281.015,"start":1274.64}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"But at your final Disney board retreat, you said, in a world of business that is awash in data, it seems tempting to use data as an answer to all our questions, including creative questions.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1289.46,"start":1281.015}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I urge you all not to do that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1291.65,"start":1289.46}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"At the same time, the person who took over after you, Bob Chapek, said, Disney is now a data-driven company.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1297.62,"start":1291.66}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What is entertainment now?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1299.24,"start":1297.62}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Is it data, or is it creativity?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1300.92,"start":1299.24}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I won't comment about what Bob said, but what you're quoting me as having said, which is accurate--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1307.07,"start":1300.93}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I was attending what was our last-- the last Disney board retreat that I would be at.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1312.77,"start":1307.07}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I opened the meeting thinking that I would leave them with some advice--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1317.157,"start":1312.77}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1317.99,"start":1317.157}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--on how to go forward.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1319.88,"start":1318}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And having spent almost 50 years on the creative side of our business, it became more and more clear to me that while data was already playing a very important role, that it should not be used to determine what stories are told.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1336.41,"start":1319.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"If we had tried to mine all the data that we had at the time to determine whether we should make a superhero movie that was essentially about an Afrofuturistic world with a Black cast, the data probably would have said, don't do that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1354.415,"start":1336.41}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Mm-hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1355.29,"start":1354.415}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And \"Black Panther\" never would have been made.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1357.665,"start":1355.3}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"There are a number of examples of that, where someone's instinct or a group of people's instinct on whether a story is worthy of being told and is in the hands of people who will tell it really well--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1371.37,"start":1357.665}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't think a machine or data, no matter how much technology enables, essentially, input of massive amounts of information to be processed--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1382.41,"start":1371.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't think you get the right answers to that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1385.25,"start":1382.41}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"[APPLAUSE]","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1387.17,"start":1385.26}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Thank you.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1388.46,"start":1387.18}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And again, I think it's valuable.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1391.88,"start":1388.46}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Once you make something, it's really valuable to learn about what people liked about it, what they didn't like, should it continue.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1400.1,"start":1391.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Interestingly enough, very effective in how to market.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1402.578,"start":1400.1}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1403.37,"start":1402.578}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"There's that famous quote-- which, I don't know whether it's apocryphal or not-- about Henry Ford.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1407.27,"start":1403.38}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And he said, if he had been asked what people wanted, they would have said, a faster horse--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1411.398,"start":1407.27}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1412.19,"start":1411.398}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--instead of a car.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1413.398,"start":1412.2}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"To me, it is somewhat analogous, too.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1418.775,"start":1414.57}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You need human beings to make those decisions.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1421.247,"start":1418.775}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So talk a little bit about Steve Jobs, because one of the people who did like stories is Steve Jobs, compared to a lot--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1426.83,"start":1421.247}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I mean, I'm sure you've met a million tech people, and they're always telling you how they can figure everything out via technology.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1432.33,"start":1426.83}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"But Steve was quite interested in narrative and storytelling.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1435.59,"start":1432.33}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"He did that with the products of Apple and stuff.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1437.84,"start":1435.59}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So talk a little bit about what you--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1439.73,"start":1437.84}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"that was one of your most significant, important relationships as a C.E.O., which really did--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1443.66,"start":1439.73}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"As a person, too.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1444.785,"start":1443.67}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Actually, we became very close friends.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1447.08,"start":1444.785}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"First of all, Steve respected storytellers and respected the art of storytelling, knowing that a great story, really well told, was a miracle in many ways, that it wasn't just an accident.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1459.56,"start":1447.08}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I think a lot of people in the tech world, because they've been so tech-centric, have not had the time in their lives or the experience to understand the intricacies of storytelling, the beauty of it, and really, the magic of it all.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1473.78,"start":1459.56}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And when Steve bought Pixar from George Lucas, he immediately became immersed in real storytelling.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1481.46,"start":1473.79}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And he was already a storyteller at heart.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1483.89,"start":1481.46}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Just look at the marketing that he used to tell stories about Apple product.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1487.64,"start":1483.89}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But this opened his eyes in a big way to the power of great stories.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1492.96,"start":1487.64}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So when we bought Pixar from him and he became the largest shareholder of Disney--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1497.75,"start":1492.97}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"and then, ultimately, I ended up replacing Steve on the Apple board.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1501.92,"start":1497.75}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But Steve knew that not only that there's a miracle to great storytelling, but that the combination of using wonderful technology to both tell better stories--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1514.25,"start":1501.92}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"what Pixar did, just using technology, richer pictures and--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1517.402,"start":1514.25}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Or Lucas.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1518.36,"start":1517.402}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Or Lucas.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1519.29,"start":1518.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But then, technology could be used to not only distribute it more effectively, but to consume it that way.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1526.02,"start":1519.29}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So I think he was very, very unique, in terms of all the people I've met in the tech business.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1532.25,"start":1526.02}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I've never met anyone that comes close to that understanding and the comprehension he has.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1538.677,"start":1532.25}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Possibly George Lucas, right, which you bought that company.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1541.76,"start":1538.677}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yes, I think George Lucas was a storyteller first that understood the power of technology in the storytellers' hands.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1549.5,"start":1541.77}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Walt Disney was another, by the way.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1551.18,"start":1549.5}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Walt Disney once said that no matter what happens, in terms of the advances in technology it will improve or expand the purview of the storyteller.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1559.235,"start":1551.18}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Mm-hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1560.11,"start":1559.235}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So he was thinking that he could tell better stories using the tools of technology, which is what George did, and it's what Steve did when he bought Pixar.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1569.71,"start":1560.12}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And when I think about Steve, one of the things I miss the most is engaging with a person who is such a brilliant technologist that really got the other side-- a left-right brain, and an extraordinary--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1584.16,"start":1569.71}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Do you imagine the technology-- when I'm thinking about Lucas, years ago, we were doing an interview, and I said-- he was talking about \"Star Wars\" and anything else he creates.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1592.175,"start":1584.17}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And I said, someday, everything's going to be distributed over this streaming, and I went on and on about this.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1596.8,"start":1592.175}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"This was about 10 years ago.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1598.07,"start":1596.8}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And I said, do you need studios, I guess, or do you need--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1601,"start":1598.07}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Oh, I see.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1602.54,"start":1601.01}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, studios can provide an important function.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1605.89,"start":1602.54}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That's money, of course, and--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1608.08,"start":1605.89}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"because they understand the process is somewhat messy.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1611.62,"start":1608.08}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And sometimes if the studio executive is really good, they can add perspective and actually help a creator see things that the creator might not see because they're so close to them.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1621.04,"start":1611.62}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And sometimes it's also marketing and platform and brand.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1626.17,"start":1621.05}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So you know, if you're a storyteller and you want to tell a story about superheroes, you're better off telling it with Marvel superheroes, distributed by Disney, than you are with--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1636.07,"start":1626.17}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Apple doesn't have any superheroes--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1638.2,"start":1636.07}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"creating one Kara Swisher superhero, and--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1639.967,"start":1638.2}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"They should.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1641.05,"start":1639.967}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--good luck.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1641.62,"start":1641.06}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1642.328,"start":1641.63}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"It's going to be fantastic.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1643.55,"start":1642.328}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"It's going to be so good.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1644.592,"start":1643.55}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"[MUSIC PLAYING]","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1649.17,"start":1646.815}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"We'll be back in a minute.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1651.548,"start":1649.18}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"If you like this interview and want to hear others, follow us on your favorite podcast app.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1655.34,"start":1651.548}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"You'll be able to catch up on \"Sway\" episodes you may have missed, like my conversation with Jeffrey Katzenberg, and you'll get new ones delivered directly to you.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1663.62,"start":1655.34}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"More with Bob Iger after the break.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1665.53,"start":1663.62}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"There is a call to break up tech companies, that they're too powerful.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1682.3,"start":1678.73}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Talk about what you think of the current situation right now, looking at-- you just told me backstage, it can't be regulated.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1688.86,"start":1682.3}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, you have this growth in these companies that's just extraordinary.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1694.84,"start":1688.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I think it is likely that you will see an attempt to regulate them a lot more.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1700.98,"start":1694.84}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"The competition is that--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1703.41,"start":1700.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think the technology businesses that would be regulated are much more complex and much more difficult to understand and figure out how to even write the right legislation to regulate them with.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1718.44,"start":1703.41}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And so I happen to be a pessimist.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1720.42,"start":1718.45}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I know the E.U. is going to try.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1722.79,"start":1720.42}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Whether the U.S. government does or not, I don't know, but I just don't think it's as easy as it sounds.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1729.61,"start":1722.79}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And yet, they continue to get larger and larger.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1732.18,"start":1729.61}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I'm not editorializing about that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1734.55,"start":1732.19}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think, with size sometimes comes abuse.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1737.88,"start":1734.55}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And you could argue that now, there are different ways that size creates abuse.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1743.43,"start":1737.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Pricing leverage over the consumer might be one way you'd look-- anti-competition or anti-competitive positions.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1751.11,"start":1743.43}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But I just think that as they get bigger, they will be in the crosshairs more and more.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1758.7,"start":1751.12}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But you know, breaking them up is--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1762.18,"start":1758.7}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't think there's anything that's going to happen that's imminent.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1765.55,"start":1762.18}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So I want to finish on-- you talked about this idea of what government can do.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1769.5,"start":1765.56}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"This is a government that hasn't done anything about tech, for example.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1772.458,"start":1769.5}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"When you look at the current political situation, it's so partisan.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1775.44,"start":1772.458}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"You know, part of Disney was to bring everybody together.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1778.92,"start":1775.45}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"It's the most happiest place on Earth.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1781.59,"start":1778.92}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Earth is not a happy place right now, in general, and this country is particularly unhappy, sort of in the middle of a mental breakdown.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1788.012,"start":1781.59}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You need to go to Disney World.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1789.72,"start":1788.012}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"No, I don't.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1790.803,"start":1789.73}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"[LAUGHTER]","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1793.21,"start":1790.803}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"No, I have-- no.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1796,"start":1793.22}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I spent three days at Disney World my last week in the company.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1799.522,"start":1796.01}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Oh, boy good for you.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1800.98,"start":1799.522}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I felt great.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1802.18,"start":1800.99}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Did you?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1803.2,"start":1802.19}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Did you?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1804.375,"start":1803.2}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I can't go to--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1805,"start":1804.375}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I cannot go to a place that smells like cinnamon rolls all the time.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1809.26,"start":1805}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I can't.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1810.22,"start":1809.26}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Churros.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1810.97,"start":1810.22}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I know you pump that-- is it churros?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1812.5,"start":1810.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Is that what you pump in, churro smell?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1814.09,"start":1812.5}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I know you did.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1814.65,"start":1814.09}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I miss the churros
