already.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1815.5,"start":1814.66}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I did like the soft serve on the cruise, though.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1817.26,"start":1815.51}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"It's fantastic.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1817.36,"start":1817.26}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think-- well, I don't know where you were going with this.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1820.28,"start":1817.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I wondered about the politics.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1821.51,"start":1820.29}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"You were going to think about running president.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1823.63,"start":1821.51}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Is that correct?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1824.512,"start":1823.63}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I was thinking about running for president.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1826.72,"start":1824.512}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yes, at one point in my life.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1828.08,"start":1826.72}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And what happened?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1829.413,"start":1828.09}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Life happened.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1831.76,"start":1829.913}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I talked about it with my wife.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1833.89,"start":1831.76}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"She knows me well enough to know--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1835.88,"start":1833.89}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"she puts it that when I see a mountain, I don't talk about climbing it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1839.23,"start":1835.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I typically climb it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1840.64,"start":1839.23}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Just who I am.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1842.17,"start":1840.64}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So she felt, when I told her I was thinking about running for president, that I was going to do it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1848.41,"start":1842.18}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And after some tears, she told me that I could run for any office in the land, but not with this wife.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1856.382,"start":1848.41}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Oh.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1857.09,"start":1856.382}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That's how she put it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1859.42,"start":1858.052}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But she softened on that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1860.675,"start":1859.42}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Mm-hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1861.55,"start":1860.675}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It was not something-- and I was seriously considering it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1864.383,"start":1861.56}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It was not something-- the family --","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1866.02,"start":1864.383}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"was happy about, at all.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1868.39,"start":1866.02}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But as I got into it more and I studied the political environment in the United States, this is in--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1876.34,"start":1868.39}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"well, I actually started talking about it before the 2016 race.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1879.79,"start":1876.34}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But then, 2020-- and I'm a registered Democrat, but I consider myself a centrist-- it became more and more clear to me that getting the nomination in today's world--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1892.49,"start":1879.79}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"which maybe says a lot about politics, too-- would be really hard, if not impossible.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1896.86,"start":1892.49}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And then, when I was thinking about it, which was 2017--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1902.26,"start":1896.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I had, again, conversations with Rupert Murdoch about buying those assets.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1905.86,"start":1902.26}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Initially, it was a $70 billion purchase.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1908.47,"start":1905.86}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I knew I was not going to be able to go to the Disney board and say, hey, I'd like to buy these assets for $70 billion, and by the way, I'm leaving.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1915.28,"start":1908.47}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Mm-hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1916.6,"start":1915.29}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"To run for president.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1918.01,"start":1916.61}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Whatever-- anything.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1918.88,"start":1918.01}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"To do anything.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1920.09,"start":1918.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So I put the whole thing aside.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1922.81,"start":1920.09}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"One, I didn't think I had great chances.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1926.44,"start":1922.81}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Two, my family was against it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1928.24,"start":1926.44}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Three, my job got in the way.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1929.498,"start":1928.24}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What would have been your platform?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1931.54,"start":1929.498}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"The trains would have run on time.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1935.53,"start":1933.697}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"The streets would have been clean.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1936.947,"start":1935.53}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I want to turn the country into-- it would have been the happiest place on earth.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1941.65,"start":1937.57}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Really?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1944.28,"start":1941.66}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So-- we're going to end-- we're not ending on that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1944.56,"start":1944.28}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"We're not ending on that, because--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1946.018,"start":1944.56}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Before we leave that--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1949.95,"start":1948.617}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1950.19,"start":1949.96}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--this was--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1951.107,"start":1950.2}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I admit-- in today's world, naive.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1953.718,"start":1951.107}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1954.51,"start":1953.718}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But I grew up under modest circumstances, and I started at ABC, which became Disney, as a $150-a-week employee in 1974, and I became C.E.O. of the Walt Disney Company by moving up and up and up.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1968.79,"start":1954.52}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And so when you ask me the question-- and I know that this is very simplistic, naive, maybe idealistic.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1975.84,"start":1968.79}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But I had this notion that every kid in America should grow up believing that they could be me, meaning that they could follow their dreams and achieve them, that they could start off with nothing and become something--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":1988.68,"start":1975.85}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"however you lead a fulfilling life, and that America would provide them with opportunity, whether they were Black or white, rich or poor, suburban, urban, rural, you name it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2002.09,"start":1988.68}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That's what I would have wanted for America.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2004.04,"start":2002.09}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Now, again, very simplistic, but that just was my thinking.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2008.09,"start":2004.04}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Are you optimistic about, you know-- joking about the happiest place on earth.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2012.14,"start":2008.1}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Get to moderately not pissed off all the time-- would be great.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2016.97,"start":2012.14}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm an optimistic person.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2018.77,"start":2016.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm concerned.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2020,"start":2018.77}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm really concerned.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2021.26,"start":2020}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"There's so much dysfunction right now, and I think-- look, the internet and technology is the ability to be a great uniter and a great divider.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2028.95,"start":2021.26}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think what we're seeing now is the divider's effect of all of that much more.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2034.64,"start":2028.95}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And so everything is fragmented, in terms of political views--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2038.63,"start":2034.65}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"even now, a dispute about what the truth is, in fact.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2042.92,"start":2038.63}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And that's concerning to me.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2044.48,"start":2042.92}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So I'm not--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2045.89,"start":2044.48}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm not optimistic, but I refuse to be a pessimist, too.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2050.48,"start":2045.89}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know where that puts me, but this-- it's disheartening right now.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2055.949,"start":2050.48}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"All right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2056.949,"start":2055.949}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"On that, we have a lot of great questions from the audience.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2060.79,"start":2056.949}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What responsibility do American business leaders have to carry out American ideals as they enter markets with differing societal values like China?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2067.87,"start":2060.79}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Wow.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2069.25,"start":2067.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"In terms of responsibilities to the country and American ideals, Disney is a global company and does business in just about every market in the world, save for a couple, North Korea being one.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2081.88,"start":2069.25}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And when you do business around the world--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2085.19,"start":2081.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"this is not a cop-out, but you have to conform to a variety of different things about the market you're doing business in.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2095.56,"start":2085.19}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And you try in the process not to compromise what I'll call values.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2100.9,"start":2095.57}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But there are compromises that companies have to make to be global.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2105.91,"start":2100.9}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And again, I'm not condoning-- and then, there are times when you draw the line and say, just, we're not going to do it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2111.91,"start":2105.91}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Now, not entering a market--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2114.61,"start":2111.91}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"if it's a huge market and you want to be a global company and you're looking for growth, it's very hard.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2119.105,"start":2114.61}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"How difficult is it for companies entering China now, given all the political--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2122.98,"start":2119.105}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think the first difficulty about China is that if you're doing business globally, you would like at least the country that you're based in to have decent relations with the countries you're trying to do business with.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2133.36,"start":2122.99}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And the tension between the United States and China has not made it any easier to do business there.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2140.87,"start":2133.36}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I think my optimism about certain markets, which was extraordinary at one point, has been diminished a bit.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2149.62,"start":2140.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2150.527,"start":2149.63}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Have you ever-- this is a total shift.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2152.11,"start":2150.527}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Alex-- have you ever personally pitched a show or movie idea?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2155.29,"start":2152.11}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"If so, was it produced?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2158.81,"start":2155.29}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I always have ideas, or had ideas.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2161.75,"start":2158.82}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Most of the time, I was politely laughed at.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2165.69,"start":2161.75}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I had a title, so they couldn't really just throw me out of the room.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2169.19,"start":2165.69}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"They had to listen, and then--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2170.45,"start":2169.19}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What was it?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2170.9,"start":2170.46}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Give me one.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2171.26,"start":2170.9}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--figure out who would get back to me.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2172.82,"start":2171.27}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Oh, I don't know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2173.528,"start":2172.82}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I pitched an idea for a sitcom once about a teenage kid who had a mother that was ridiculously sexy.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2180.263,"start":2173.528}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2182.438,"start":2180.263}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2183.23,"start":2182.438}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"They thought that was absurd.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2184.855,"start":2183.24}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I don't even want to know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2186.522,"start":2184.855}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I just remember that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2187.83,"start":2186.522}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But then, you know, I remember at one point--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2189.68,"start":2187.83}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Do you remember the title?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2191.347,"start":2189.69}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I can't help but ask that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2192.813,"start":2191.347}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"There was a video.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2193.98,"start":2192.813}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"This is-- we're going into this kind of detail?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2195.93,"start":2193.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"This is a question from the audience!","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2197.15,"start":2195.94}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Be respectful of the audience.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2198.51,"start":2197.15}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"There was a video called \"Stacy's Mom.\"","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2199.85,"start":2198.52}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I-- I know that's a-- that's a, uh--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2201.35,"start":2199.85}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Wait.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2204.335,"start":2203.543}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That's a common--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2204.83,"start":2204.345}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Wayne.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2205.07,"start":2204.84}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Fountains of Wayne.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2205.88,"start":2205.07}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yeah, they thought I was crazy, and they were right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2207.8,"start":2205.89}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah!","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2208.28,"start":2207.81}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"God.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2208.82,"start":2208.28}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It was a bad idea.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2209.66,"start":2208.83}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You hope, by the way--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2210.7,"start":2209.66}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Man, you would have been so canceled.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2212.3,"start":2210.71}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You hope that-- you hope you create an environment-- it goes back to what we talked about earlier--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2216.842,"start":2212.31}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"where people feel that it's a safe space to show disagreement or dissent.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2221.87,"start":2216.842}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Now, around the same time, I exhorted ABC to do a series, a drama series around a heroic woman surgeon.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2231.47,"start":2221.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And just around that time, a woman named Shonda Rhimes had pitched two ideas to ABC.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2238.52,"start":2231.48}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"One was about heroic war correspondents.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2241.19,"start":2238.52}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And the other one was about young surgeons, and that became \"Grey's Anatomy.\"","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2246.7,"start":2241.19}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Not my pitch.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2247.407,"start":2246.7}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2248.24,"start":2247.407}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But we both sort of supported the same idea.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2252.368,"start":2248.25}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What-- anonymous again.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2253.91,"start":2252.368}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What has Disney done to weather the Great Resignation that other companies could learn from?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2258.23,"start":2253.91}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I also call it the Great Reassessment.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2260.545,"start":2258.23}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2261.17,"start":2260.545}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, tell me what is going on there.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2263,"start":2261.17}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Why don't people want to work?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2264.56,"start":2263}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Because some jobs suck, and they're sick of it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2267.193,"start":2264.57}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2267.86,"start":2267.193}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2267.89,"start":2267.86}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But there are also jobs that need to be filled as a company.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2270.39,"start":2267.89}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Well, yes.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2273.56,"start":2272.56}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And you'd better quickly address what your immigration policy is, or you're going to run out of people to--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2280.085,"start":2273.57}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So what do you do if you're managing?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2282.21,"start":2280.085}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, first of all, if you're Disney or if you're any company, you have to be an attractive place to work.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2286.7,"start":2282.22}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"What does that mean?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2287.54,"start":2286.7}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Competitive wages.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2288.98,"start":2287.54}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"In inflationary time, that becomes even more tricky when you're trying to grow your profits and things are going up in terms of cost.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2295.998,"start":2288.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But you have to be competitive.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2297.29,"start":2295.998}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You have to create opportunity.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2299,"start":2297.29}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"At Disney, we put in place a plan four or five years ago that any hourly employee, of which there are well over 80,000, at Disney could get free education--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2308.55,"start":2299}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"vocational, high school equivalency, junior college, undergraduate, graduate while you're working.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2314.39,"start":2308.55}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"No strings attached, we pay--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2316.31,"start":2314.39}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"all designed to enable people to have opportunity--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2319.08,"start":2316.31}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"[APPLAUSE]","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2320.87,"start":2319.09}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--to earn more-- thank you.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2323.72,"start":2320.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That was an idea that was pitched to me.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2325.59,"start":2323.72}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think I said yes about a minute in.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2327.255,"start":2325.59}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Mm-hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2328.13,"start":2327.255}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--to it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2328.88,"start":2328.14}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It made so much sense.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2330.14,"start":2328.88}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Huge retention vehicle and attraction vehicle.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2333.168,"start":2330.14}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What about wages?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2334.46,"start":2333.168}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What about bringing wages up?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2336.5,"start":2334.46}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think wages have to be addressed.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2339.83,"start":2336.51}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Aside from just what I'll call income inequality, it is more expensive to live these days.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2345.74,"start":2339.83}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I think as a company, look, you can't solve everybody's problems all the time, but you have to be mindful of what it costs to live in places that they have to work, or they end up having a commute that is too long.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2360.71,"start":2345.74}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I think one of the things you're finding now is, people during Covid got really happy or comfortable not having to commute.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2367.245,"start":2360.71}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Mm-hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2368.12,"start":2367.245}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And who wants to go back to getting in a car for an hour and a half to go to work?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2372.6,"start":2368.13}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So that's a huge issue.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2374.42,"start":2372.6}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"How do you address that, other than wages?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2376.79,"start":2374.42}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2377.54,"start":2376.79}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"There's-- we looked at affordable housing.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2379.97,"start":2377.54}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It's hard, when you have the scale that we do, to come up with enough of it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2383.84,"start":2379.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"We even at one point talked about getting involved in creating public transportation at some point, but that's impractical.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2391.55,"start":2383.84}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So I think--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2392.24,"start":2391.55}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Well, that's what the tech companies are doing.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2392.63,"start":2392.25}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"The wage issue is very real.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2394.37,"start":2392.64}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Living wage is very-- you have to consider what it costs to live in Orange County, California.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2400.83,"start":2394.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And then, add on to that food and transportation, and health care, and it's tough.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2405.555,"start":2400.83}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And if you want to fill all your positions, you've got to think about that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2408.68,"start":2405.555}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2409.4,"start":2408.69}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2409.82,"start":2409.4}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What is-- this is Matt King.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2411.05,"start":2409.82}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What is your perspective on the metaverse, NFTs, and other emerging technologies and their potential impact on entertainment media?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2416.902,"start":2411.05}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I was going to ask you.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2417.86,"start":2416.902}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think-- look, I think that internet 3.0, which will definitely be more compelling in experience, certainly more immersive, more dimensional--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2428.36,"start":2417.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think there'll be a lot to that, in terms of a future.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2431.15,"start":2428.36}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And call it a metaverse.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2432.65,"start":2431.15}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't think there'll be one metaverse.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2434.36,"start":2432.65}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think-- I talk about democratization.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2437.06,"start":2434.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"It'll be dispersed.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2439.4,"start":2437.06}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You may have an avatar, but you'll go all over the place.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2444,"start":2439.4}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I think that it's likely to be developed into something real as an experience.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2449.21,"start":2444}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That said, there's been enough said and criticized about toxic behavior in internet 2.0--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2455.45,"start":2449.22}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Twitter, Facebook, you name it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2457.7,"start":2455.45}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Imagine what can happen when you have a much more compelling and immersive and--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2463.25,"start":2457.7}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'll call it collective of people or avatars of people in that environment, and what kind of toxic behavior could happen.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2471.11,"start":2463.25}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm thinking about telling my kids that they should start creating technology tools to moderate behavior in internet 3.0, because I think it's going to be a huge challenge.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2483.06,"start":2471.12}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"So I think something Disney is going to have to consider as it talks about creating a metaverse for themselves is moderating and monitoring behavior.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2489.79,"start":2483.06}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And that's difficult for a company like Disney, 'cause it's got to keep it clean, right?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2494.04,"start":2489.79}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, the standard is so high, particularly since you have kids in.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2497.66,"start":2494.05}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I think it's something that has to be considered.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2500.03,"start":2497.66}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Do you think Instagram should make Instagram for kids?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2503.28,"start":2500.04}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"No.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2504.86,"start":2503.29}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"No, but it's not my business.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2506.4,"start":2504.86}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2507.15,"start":2506.4}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I do think--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2508.067,"start":2507.16}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"NFTs, I think, are real.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2510.11,"start":2508.067}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I was a big trading card fan as a kid-- baseball cards.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2514.52,"start":2510.11}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think the ability to collect things, even if they're digital-- we forget, in our generation, that things don't have to be physical.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2522.32,"start":2514.52}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"They can be digital, and they have meaning to people.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2524.94,"start":2522.33}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And as long as that meaning can be essentially substantiated in a blockchain, I think you're going to see an explosion of things being created, traded, collected in NFTs.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2536.635,"start":2524.94}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Now, Disney has not gone into this area as heavily as--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2539.51,"start":2536.635}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Disney has.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2540.385,"start":2539.52}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Disney has done some licensing.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2542.93,"start":2540.385}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'm not--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2543.44,"start":2542.93}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Of things.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2544.44,"start":2543.45}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't have all the details, because it happened at the very end of my watch.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2548.18,"start":2544.44}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But there is some-- look, when you think about all the copyright and trademarks, characters Disney has--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2552.35,"start":2548.18}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Exactly.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2552.65,"start":2552.36}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"--and the NFT possibilities, they're extraordinary.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2555.18,"start":2552.66}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"They can also be stolen.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2556.763,"start":2555.19}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"There's been a lot of fraud around that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2559.04,"start":2556.763}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And copy-- the other thing I've noticed--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2561.165,"start":2559.05}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I went on a platform called OpenSea, which is a platform to buy and trade NFTs.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2566.12,"start":2561.165}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Mm-hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2567.143,"start":2566.13}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I was amazed at all the Disney stuff that was there, and most of it was pirated.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2571.06,"start":2567.143}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yes.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2571.81,"start":2571.07}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Most of it was not created by people who had the right to create them.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2575.31,"start":2571.81}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Well, it's like early YouTube, if you recall all those lawsuits.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2577.67,"start":2575.32}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2578.3,"start":2577.68}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Very much so.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2579.23,"start":2578.31}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"All right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2579.73,"start":2579.23}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Jenny-- what Disney character do you most relate with?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2584.15,"start":2579.73}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Oh, jeez.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2585.747,"start":2584.16}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Everybody always says, what's your favorite?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2587.58,"start":2585.747}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I always say, Tinkerbell.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2588.622,"start":2587.58}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know why that was so easy.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2590.21,"start":2588.622}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And then, they say, well, who would you like to be?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2591.72,"start":2590.21}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I would say, Thor, but that was because Chris Hemsworth is just a god, right?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2595.01,"start":2591.72}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Mm-hmm.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2595.46,"start":2595.02}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Who wouldn't want to look like that?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2597.02,"start":2595.59}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2597.71,"start":2597.03}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Do you relate?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2598.293,"start":2597.71}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know if I'd relate.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2599.924,"start":2598.293}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I think I'm probably more of a Woody than a Buzz.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2601.966,"start":2599.924}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2602.508,"start":2601.966}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What have you found to be the superpower that you possess that has led to your success?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2609.35,"start":2605.142}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And I want you to actually tell me what superpower you would like.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2613.01,"start":2609.35}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I have--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2613.81,"start":2613.02}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know whether this is my parents' doing or I was born this way or both, but I have an incredible work ethic.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2621.59,"start":2613.81}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I just work hard, and it's served me incredibly well.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2626.81,"start":2621.59}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And right next to that, which I know was drawn out by my parents, is an insatiable curiosity to just learn more and more.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2635.03,"start":2626.81}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2635.99,"start":2635.04}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What about an actual superpower?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2639.237,"start":2635.99}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Like what?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2640.07,"start":2639.237}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't run fast, or-- what?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2641.62,"start":2640.07}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Something.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2642.62,"start":2641.62}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Hello, you make Marvel movies.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2643.87,"start":2642.62}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"There's like-- come on.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2644.91,"start":2643.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Those are fantasies.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2646.16,"start":2644.91}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah, I know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2646.58,"start":2646.17}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What is your fantasy superpower?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2648.02,"start":2646.58}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Oh, what's my fantasy.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2649.44,"start":2648.03}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah, I'm not saying you're going to get it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2653.135,"start":2649.45}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I'll start-- invisibility.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2654.3,"start":2653.135}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Go ahead.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2654.8,"start":2654.3}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"No, no, no.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2656.17,"start":2654.81}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Totally.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2656.27,"start":2656.18}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Are you kidding?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2657.25,"start":2656.27}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I'd totally sneak around.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2659.15,"start":2657.25}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't have an ambition to be a superhero.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2661.568,"start":2659.16}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I know, but what superpower--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2663.36,"start":2661.568}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And so I don't feel I need superpowers.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2667.28,"start":2663.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"None?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2668.932,"start":2667.29}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Didn't you guys just make the \"Eternals\"?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2670.64,"start":2668.932}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I mean, come on.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2671.307,"start":2670.64}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Which one would you like?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2673.22,"start":2671.307}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"To live forever.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2674.51,"start":2673.23}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Live forever?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2675.08,"start":2674.52}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Which one do you want?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2676.01,"start":2675.08}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"None of them.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2676.61,"start":2676.01}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"You want no superpower.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2677.568,"start":2676.61}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"All right.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2678.375,"start":2677.568}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I'm gonna be invisible.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2680.747,"start":2678.375}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'd like to be--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2681.83,"start":2680.747}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'd like other things.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2683.06,"start":2681.83}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I'd love to be able to paint.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2684.357,"start":2683.06}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Paint?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2685.19,"start":2684.357}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Oh, there you go.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2686.03,"start":2685.19}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"That's not a superpower.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2686.79,"start":2686.03}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"You can't do that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2686.86,"start":2686.79}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"When I retired, George Bush sent me a note saying, what are you going to do now?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2690.61,"start":2686.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Paint?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2691.19,"start":2690.61}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"'Cause he paints.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2693.105,"start":2691.19}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Do you own a George Bush?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2694.73,"start":2693.105}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"No.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2695.06,"start":2694.73}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"He sent me the book.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2696.31,"start":2695.07}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Oh, no.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2697.6,"start":2696.31}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2698.54,"start":2697.6}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"What criticism of Disney Company has hit you the hardest?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2703.04,"start":2698.54}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, I take any criticism about how we've treated our people very--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2708.62,"start":2703.05}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I took it very personally.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2711.26,"start":2708.62}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That would be it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2712.77,"start":2711.26}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"So you have a specific one?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2714.86,"start":2712.78}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Well, the main one is wages.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2717.65,"start":2714.87}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"But I've defended that before, because we were one of the first companies to go to $10 an hour.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2723.26,"start":2717.65}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"We went to $15 an hour, minimum wage.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2725.99,"start":2723.26}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"In both cases, they were higher than state and federal minimums at the time.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2729.65,"start":2725.99}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You know, when you manage these companies, you're balancing multiple forces when it comes to finances.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2737.07,"start":2729.66}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And this is not an excuse, but you need to grow your profits for your shareholders.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2743.72,"start":2737.07}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And maybe I'm talking to some government officials right now about-- this is for them.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2747.5,"start":2743.72}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You need to do that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2748.76,"start":2747.5}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"You need to keep your pricing reasonable for consumers in mind, which in an inflationary environment, just gets even more critical.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2757.05,"start":2748.77}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And you'd like to pay your people whatever it takes to make them happy and to keep them motivated, but they all kind of have to fit in with one another in some very careful balance.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2766.958,"start":2757.05}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2767.75,"start":2766.958}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Because if--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2769.7,"start":2767.76}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know anybody who wouldn't want to pay their people more, but then you got to figure out, well, if we do that, and you have to grow your bottom line, can you raise prices?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2777.98,"start":2769.7}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And then, you alienate your consumers.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2780.2,"start":2777.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And so it's a delicate balance.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2781.9,"start":2780.2}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Just saying, maybe you could pay C.E.O.s less.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2784.4,"start":2781.9}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2784.91,"start":2784.4}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Who--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2785.41,"start":2784.91}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"[LAUGHTER]","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2787.057,"start":2785.41}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"I'm teasing.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2787.58,"start":2787.067}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"That-- I-- yeah.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2788.9,"start":2787.59}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I knew you were going there.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2789.66,"start":2788.9}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"You walked right into it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2790.65,"start":2789.67}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"You just literally walked right into it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2792.6,"start":2790.65}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"OK.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2793.17,"start":2792.6}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Last question.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2793.98,"start":2793.17}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Can you sum up your legacy in five words or less?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2797.265,"start":2793.98}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I was going to say I can't--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2801.28,"start":2799.697}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Ah!","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2801.626,"start":2801.29}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"That's not five words.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2802.543,"start":2801.626}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I came, I saw, I conquered, is six.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2806.158,"start":2802.543}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Five words or less-- oh, I'll just say one thing.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2808.2,"start":2806.158}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I was fortunate enough to be kind of handed the keys to the kingdom, to get the opportunity to run a company that had an incredible reputation and was important in the world.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2818.28,"start":2808.2}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"And I wanted to make sure when I left, that I burnished that legacy, that it was stronger, more admired, better than it was when I got it.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2826.212,"start":2818.28}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I feel that I've accomplished that.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2827.67,"start":2826.212}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"All right, but five words.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2828.27,"start":2827.68}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"That wasn't five.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2829.05,"start":2828.27}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I can't.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2829.8,"start":2829.06}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Yes, you can.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2831.93,"start":2829.8}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Five words.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2832.92,"start":2831.93}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"No?","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2833.42,"start":2832.92}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"No, no.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2834.96,"start":2833.43}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I was a force--","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2838.21,"start":2834.96}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"I don't know.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2839.277,"start":2838.21}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"May the force be with you.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2840.36,"start":2839.277}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Oh, there you go.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2840.966,"start":2840.37}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Thank you, Bob Iger.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2841.799,"start":2840.966}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"Thank you.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2844.781,"start":2843.76}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"BOB IGER","text":"[MUSIC Schick, Daphne Chen, Caitlin O'Keefe, and Wyatt Orme, edited by Nayeema Raza, with original music by Isaac Jones, mixing by Isaac Jones and Carole Sabouraud, and fact-checking by Kate Sinclair and Mary Marge Locker.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2873.71,"start":2857.93}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"Special thanks to Shannon Busta, Kristin Lin, and Kristina Samulewski.","timecode":{"__typename":"AudioTimecode","end":2878.21,"start":2873.71}},{"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment","speaker":"KARA SWISHER","text":"And thanks also to Thomas Vecchione, Nicholas Seaver and the team at the Richmond Forum, where we taped this by","renderedRepresentation":"Produced by ‘Sway’"}],"hideHeadshots":true,"role":[],"textAlign":"LEFT"},{"__typename":"ParagraphBlock","content":[{"__typename":"TextInline","formats":[],"text":"Bob Iger’s recent retirement from Disney marks a sea change for the company. Starting at ABC nearly 50 years ago, Iger ascended from working at a local news network to serving as the chief executive and chairman of Disney, ABC’s owner. During that time, he navigated tectonic shifts in Hollywood, including the rise of streaming platforms and the fall of movie chains. So Kara Swisher dragged Iger out of his three weeks of retirement to chat more about the future of this conversation, Kara and Iger talk about his strategy for getting Disney through the streaming wars, including the impact of significant acquisitions, from Iger’s deal to bring in Lucasfilm, the studio behind the Star Wars franchise, to the company’s $71.3 billion purchase of 21st Century Fox assets. They also discuss the symbiosis and tensions between Silicon Valley and Hollywood, the power of creators in the digital world and what entertainment will look like on web3. And they discuss Iger’s political ambitions, and why he decided against running for president."}],"textAlign":"LEFT"},{"__typename":"Dropzone","adsDesktop":true,"adsDesktopHoldout":true,"adsHybrid":true,"adsHybridHoldout":true,"adsMobile":true,"adsMobileHoldout":true,"bad":false,"index":2},{"__typename":"ParagraphBlock","content":[{"__typename":"TextInline","formats":[{"__typename":"ItalicFormat","type":null}],"text":"(A
